action.description: Action to apply to every id.

app_slug.description: Heimdall app slug override for `action: invite-to-app`. When omitted, falls back to `rally_settings.default_heimdall_app_slug`. Ignored for approve/reject.

ids.description: Entry UUIDs to act on in this batch. Capped at 100 per call; the request is processed serially and per-row results are returned. De-duped server-side.

send_email.description: Whether to send the rally/approved email with the invite link baked in. Defaults to `true`. Ignored for approve/reject.

recaptcha_token.description: reCAPTCHA v3 token; verified server-side when the waitlist has settings.recaptcha_site_key

referral_code.description: Referral code from a prior signup; bumps that signup’s position when honoured

variant_id.description: Variant id this submission was attributed to. Customer frontends fetch the active variant from `GET /v1/waitlists/:workspaceSlug/:waitlistSlug` and round-trip it here on POST so per-variant conversion can be computed without a separate impressions table.

copy.description: Copy overrides. Recognised keys: display_name, description, confirmation_message. Unknown keys are dropped on the public render.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale tag. For ab variants this is the locale they target; for locale variants this is the locale they serve. Case is normalised on the public side.

weight.description: Relative weight inside the ab pool. Ignored when kind=locale. Default 1.

description.description: Description returned in the public waitlist payload — customer frontends typically render it under the display name on their signup form.

settings.description: Waitlist settings (max_entries, approval_required, custom_fields, confirmation_message, referral_boost)

active.description: Disabled webhooks store events but never deliver

url.description: Destination URL (must be https in prod)

app_slug.description: Heimdall app slug to invite into; defaults to rally_settings.default_heimdall_app_slug

send_email.description: Send the rally/approved email with the Heimdall invite link baked in

event.description: Event type to fire as a synthetic test

waitlist_id.description: Waitlist UUID to reference in the synthetic payload. Defaults to a placeholder UUID when omitted.

approved_template_name.description: Envoi template name used for entry.approved notifications. Must already exist in the workspace template store.

brand_logo_url.description: Logo URL returned in the public waitlist payload. Customer frontends render it on their own signup form.

brand_name.description: Brand name returned in the public waitlist payload. Customer frontends render it on their own signup form.

default_heimdall_app_slug.description: Heimdall consumer-app slug to invite approved entries into. null clears the link.

default_sender_address.description: Verified sender address used as the From envelope on Rally notifications. Must belong to default_sender_domain_id. null clears the override.

default_sender_domain_id.description: Envoi (mail-api) domain UUID to use as default sender for Rally notifications. null clears the override.

notifications_via_envoi.description: Route Rally notifications via Envoi (workspace sender domain + per-event template selection) instead of staying silent. Requires default_sender_domain_id, default_sender_address, and a template name for every supported event. Default false; when off, Rally sends no notification emails and the customer is expected to handle email via the webhook lane.

rejected_template_name.description: Envoi template name used for entry.rejected notifications. Must already exist in the workspace template store.

welcome_template_name.description: Envoi template name used for entry.created notifications. Must already exist in the workspace template store.

settings.description: Waitlist settings (max_entries, approval_required, custom_fields, confirmation_message, referral_boost).

signing_secret.description: Plaintext signing secret returned EXACTLY ONCE on create + rotate. Persist immediately — it does not appear on subsequent GETs.

info.description: Waitlist management for the ProductCraft platform
info.title: Waitlist API

parameters.description: BCP-47 locale tag (e.g. `en`, `pt-BR`). Wins over Accept-Language when picking the variant.
parameters.name: lang

404.description: Waitlist not found or not active

get.summary: Public waitlist info (display name, description, custom-field schema, branding hints, active variant)

422.description: Waitlist is not active or is full

429.description: Too many requests from this IP

post.summary: Submit a new entry to a public waitlist

404.description: Waitlist not found or not active

get.summary: Public top-50 referral leaderboard. Emails are masked. Anonymous read; same access policy as the public waitlist info endpoint.

404.description: Workspace does not exist or is not Rally-enabled.

400.description: Validation failure on the patch body (per `UpdateSettingsDto`).

404.description: Workspace does not exist or is not Rally-enabled.

parameters.description: Stripe-style idempotency key. Waitlist creation provisions a non-trivial sub-tree (variant, default referral settings, etc.); a retry without this header creates a second waitlist sharing the same name slug. 24h TTL.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

403.description: Caller lacks `waitlist.create`, or workspace has not enabled the `rally` service.

409.description: Slug already taken in this workspace.

200.description: Aggregated analytics payload for the waitlist.

404.description: Waitlist does not exist or is not in the path workspace.

get.summary: Aggregate counts, viral coefficient, top referrers + referrals

200.description: Daily timeline array, oldest first, zero-count days included.

404.description: Waitlist does not exist or is not in the path workspace.

get.summary: Daily-bucketed signup timeline (UTC, dense — zero-count days included)

200.description: Page of entries with pagination cursor.

403.description: Caller lacks `entry.read`, or workspace has not enabled the `rally` service.

404.description: Waitlist not found in this workspace.

200.description: `{ requested, succeeded, failed, results }`. Each row in `results` carries `{ id, status: "ok" | "error", error?: { code, message } }` so a partial failure (one bad id) doesn't fail the whole batch.

400.description: Empty `ids`, more than 100 ids, or unknown action.

post.summary: Bulk-apply approve / reject / invite-to-app to multiple entries at once. Capped at 100 ids per call. Processed serially server-side; per-row results are returned so the UI can render partial successes.

get.summary: Total entry count for a waitlist
Stream every entry as CSV (admin export)

delete.summary: Delete an entry (positions are not renumbered)

404.description: Entry not found in this waitlist.

422.description: No linked Heimdall app for this workspace

post.summary: Invite an approved entry into a linked Heimdall consumer app (one-click cross-product handoff)

get.summary: List all variants on a waitlist

404.description: Waitlist not found in this workspace

patch.summary: Update a variant (locale, copy, weight, active)

get.summary: List webhooks for the workspace (secrets masked)

parameters.description: Stripe-style idempotency key. The signing secret is returned exactly once; a retry without this header creates a second webhook + secret you never see the plaintext for. 24h TTL.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

201.description: Webhook created. Includes plaintext `signing_secret` exactly once.

post.summary: Create a workspace webhook. The response includes the per-row signing secret in clear EXACTLY ONCE — copy it now.

200.description: `{ data: Array<{ id, event_id, event_type, attempt_number, status_code, response_body, error_message, latency_ms, created_at }> }`

get.summary: Recent delivery attempts for a webhook (default 50, max 200, newest first)

post.summary: Rotate the signing secret. Returns the new secret in clear EXACTLY ONCE.
Fire a synthetic test event to this webhook (asynchronous; check the destination logs)
